entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes Fusarium wilt in chickpea

entities.description: A 50K SNP array used for genotyping chickpea to identify marker-trait associations

entities.description: A specific stable and major marker associated with FW resistance

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIATION

entities.name: CHICKPEA BREEDING PROGRAMS
